name: People's War
flavor: Combined Arms Doctrine — Giáp's asymmetric attrition: harass the enemy from every side while your own forces melt away and endure.
summary: Place 1 Suppression token on each of up to 3 enemy units anywhere, then remove 1 Casualty from one allied unit.

effects.text: Harass: up to 3 enemy units each gain 1 Suppression token.
Endure: remove 1 Casualty from one allied unit.
